name: auto-continue-on-429
description: Auto-resume Codex or Claude Code when a turn stops after a rate-limit / 429 error.

interface.longDescription: Runs a Stop hook that parses Codex JSONL transcripts, ignores normal messages/tool output/hook prompts, and continues only after explicit rate-limit error events.
defaultPrompt: Use Auto Continue on 429 for this thread.
